label: normal
description: Baseline behavior with adequate awareness, fair intent, and reasonable self-control.

label: idiot
description: Primary failure in awareness or understanding; harm is mostly caused by confusion, ignorance, or poor reasoning.

label: asshole
description: Primary failure in intent or regard for others; behavior is knowingly selfish, callous, or exploitative.

label: jackass
description: Primary failure in self-control, recklessness, or ego-driven behavior; disruptive even when not purely malicious.

label: shitbird
description: Composite of K1 + K3: low awareness plus recklessness; chaotic and disruptive without stable understanding.

label: dipshit
description: Composite of K1 + K2: poor understanding plus selfish intent; harms others while also reasoning badly.

label: fuckhead
description: Composite of K2 + K3: selfish intent plus recklessness; knowingly harmful and impulsively damaging.

label: awareness_failure
description: Deficit in understanding, foresight, or competence.

label: intent_failure
description: Deficit in fairness, regard for others, or pro-social intent.

label: control_failure
description: Deficit in self-control, prudence, or ego regulation.
